title: Sources reading experience
description: Non-runnable container for the full Sources tab reading flow. All implementation, testing, documentation, and review are expressed as children. Parallel entry points: ArticleFeed enum, ArticleRowView, and ArticlePagerView have no inter-dependencies and can start concurrently. APIClient and ArticleListView-core gate most downstream beads.
acceptance_criteria: xcodegen generate succeeds; xcodebuild test exits 0 including new ArticleFeedTests
Sources tab shows a Feeds section (Important, Unread) above real sources
Tapping Important or Unread lists cross-source articles; tapping a source lists that source's articles
Article list shows in-view scrolling header, sort toggle, read/unread filter, progressive loading, and pull-to-refresh
Sort and read/unread filter persist across launches via shared ListPreferences store
Tapping an article opens ArticleDetailView; swiping left/right navigates between articles in the list
Read articles visually de-emphasised vs unread in ArticleRowView
Cancelled fetches do not show an error state
No hardcoded hex colors; Liquid Glass conventions preserved throughout
